name: calc-py
description: Python web-transport demo: evaluates a math expression on calc.request and publishes the result on calc.result. Proves the multi-language node pattern.

default_subscriptions.description: Evaluate a math expression in Python. Payload: {"expression": "<python expression>"}; result lands on calc.result.

expression.description: Python expression to evaluate, e.g. "2+2" or "sum([1,2,3])".
